package.name: agi_x2_deploy_onnx_ref
package.description:
Reference real-robot deploy harness for the AgiBot X2 Ultra (31 DOF). Loads a fused encoder+decoder ONNX policy exported from the SONIC training pipeline, builds the IsaacLab-ordered proprioception (990 D) and tokenizer (680 D) observations from live AimDK ROS 2 state, and publishes PD-target joint commands at 500 Hz with on-board stiffness/damping that matches the trained implicit-PD spec.
Phase 3 of .cursor/plans/x2-ultra-onnx-deploy_9dde7da2.plan.md.
